description: This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is sold by Almaador. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.
name: Formula: Enchant Gloves - Threat

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Formula: Enchant Gloves - Threat Phase 1 Item Level 70 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (300) Requires The Sha'tar - Exalted Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant gloves to increase the threat that the wearer generates against monsters. Permanently enchant gloves to increase threat from all attacks and spells by 2%. Sell Price: 2 50 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is sold by Almaador. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.
